subcodes.first_line: O ye loving friends of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! It is early morning and I have returned to Haifa from the Shrine of the Bab
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء صبح است و از مقام اعلی روحی لتربته الفداء بحیفا
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @martyrdom of the Bab, @Shrines and Holy places, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
